metadata.description: Tableau -> Microsoft Fabric / Power BI agent skills: live MCP landing zone, datasource profiling / NL-query, estate comparison, and semantic-model migration. For code-executing Copilots (GitHub Copilot CLI, Claude Code, Cursor).

plugins.name: tableau-fabric-skills
plugins.description: All four Tableau -> Microsoft Fabric / Power BI agent skills: profile & NL-query a Tableau datasource, stand up the official Tableau MCP server on Azure for Copilot, compare a whole Tableau estate against a Fabric tenant to see what already exists vs. needs rebuilding, and rebuild Tableau datasources as Fabric / Power BI semantic models (calc -> DAX).

plugins.name: tableau-migration
plugins.description: [DEPRECATED ALIAS of tableau-fabric-skills@tableau-collection -- pre-0.2.0 users only; new installs should use tableau-fabric-skills.] Rebuild Tableau datasources as Microsoft Fabric / Power BI semantic models: typed TMDL, inferred relationships, deterministic calc -> DAX (preserving every original formula), storage-mode auto-selection, and a self-contained Fabric REST deploy.
